content.en:
True River Valley.

Seeing that Zhenyang is back, the Lord of the True River Valley soon knows about Miao'an!

"True Yang, Miao An should be the focus of Taisu Palace's cultivation, and he is not allowed to contact the outside world, so there is no way to contact you. The Lord of the True River Valley said.

"Let's hope so!"

True Yang nodded slightly.

Suddenly.

The Lord of the True River Valley said, "True Yang, you should know our Cave Light Elder of the True River Valley, right?"

"Elder Dongguang, I know, the strength is not bad in the First Supreme Dao Realm!"

The True River Valley Lord said again: "Elder Dongguang has been staying in the Taixuan Ancient Capital all these years, I have learned a little about it, and then I know that Elder Dongguang has been leading the Dao Great Array to comprehend the rules of the Dao!"

"What, the Great Array of Pilots!"

True Yang was shocked.

He naturally knew that he had also gone to the Great Array of Enlightenment, but only once, because the quota for entering the Great Array for Enlightenment was extremely precious, and he needed to exchange a lot of rare materials for the quota.

With the help of Miao An, he only got one chance, and even Miao An didn't enter it many times.

The True River Valley Lord continued: "If you only enter it once, it will be enough, but Elder Dongguang has entered the Great Array again and again, how many materials do you need, even if we are in the entire True River Valley, we can't collect the materials once! Moreover, not long ago, Elder Dongguang was a six-time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he became the Supreme Dao Realm in a short period of time, and he still had such wealth, which was very abnormal. I suspect that Elder Dongguang has gained a great opportunity, such as the inheritance and wealth left by a certain supreme powerhouse!"

Zhenyang is a little moved!

His talent is actually not too high, he has only cultivated to this point by eating soft rice, if he doesn't have much chance, he can only cultivate to the Triple Dao Realm at most after a long time!

If Miao An rises in the future, he is expected to go further.

However, Miao An didn't even say a word of parting this time, did she have no time to say it, or did she have bad thoughts about him?

In this world, Taoist couples may not always last, and the two of them have not given birth to children, so the relationship is not strong.

What if Miao An kicks him out?

It would be nice if you could get a great opportunity on your own.

"Father, you want to attack Elder Dongguang???"

Zhenyang asked.

"Yes!" the True River Valley Lord nodded, "Although this will result in the loss of one True River Valley Elder, but now there are few elders in the True River Valley, what does it matter if there is one less, if you and my father and son both become Triple Supreme Dao Realm, it is worth it more than ten more hundred elders." "

"yes!"

True Yang agreed.

But there is a problem at the moment: "Father, Elder Dongguang has been leading the Dao Great Array to enlightenment, we can't do it in the Taixuan Ancient Capital, once we do it, we will definitely die." "

"Of course not, when he came out of the Guiding Dao Array, he immediately summoned him, saying that an amazing treasure had been discovered in the True River Valley, and he needed to come back to discuss. And, by my orders, he must come back unless he defects to the True River Valley. "The main road of the True River Valley.

"Okay, just do what my father says!"

True Yang answered.

......

After a while, the time for the Great Array of Pilots arrived.

Ye Tian came out of the Great Array of the Guiding Dao, ready to pay the Blood Gold of the Supreme Dao to enter the next Great Array of the Guiding Dao, and went in to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao.

But at this time, the Lord of the True River Valley sent a message.

"Find the treasure land, come back and discuss!"

Ye Tian could feel the urgency of the True River Valley Lord's message and the strong commanding tone.

He frowned slightly.

He originally wanted to continue to comprehend the Supreme Dao Rules, but if he went back, he would undoubtedly delay this time of the Supreme Dao Rules.

Although today's Guiding Dao Array is not very helpful to him, it is so helpful!

"Forget it, let's go back, after all, I still need the identity of the elder of the True River Valley now. Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he went back from the Taixuan Ancient Capital.

Not long after leaving Taixuangu, he came to a territory.

Suddenly, the Void transforms.

The heavens and the earth here are sealed off by a supreme weapon.

"True River Map!"

Ye Tian's voice said lightly.

The True River Map is a three-pattern supreme weapon and the strongest weapon in the True River Valley, which can suppress the void and block all things, and is controlled by the True River Valley Lord, but the True River Valley Lord rarely uses the True River Map, and the last time he went to the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, the True River Valley Lord brought the True River Map.

"Lord of the True River Valley, what do you mean by that?"

Ye Tian asked.

Wow!

The True River Valley Lord and True Yang appeared one after another, surging with all their strength.

"Elder Dongguang, you have entered the Great Array of Dao Guidance too many times in the Taixuan Ancient Capital, and your wealth is enough to make us all frightened. I know that you have entered the Great Array of the Guiding Dao so much, and the Supreme Dao Rule Realm is definitely not low, but you only have one Supreme Dao Realm cultivation, and you are far from our opponent. I advise you to hand over your inheritance and wealth, and perhaps we will let you go!" said the Lord of the True River Valley.

"True River Valley Lord, I didn't expect you to do something to the elders of your own forces! If I am strong, wouldn't it be a good thing for True River Valley?" Ye Tian said lightly.

The Lord of the True River Valley sneered, "What does it matter to me if you are strong? Maybe you will leave the True River Valley at any time, only if I am strong can I strengthen the True River Valley." "

"Hey!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Originally, he really wanted to promote the True River Valley, and even if he left in the future, he would give some benefits.

But he didn't expect the Lord of the True River Valley to beat his idea, but he also felt normal.

After all, the wealth he revealed was too amazing, and it was no wonder that the Lord of the True River Valley was moved.

If it is other supreme realms, it will also be exciting.

The main thing is that he is too high-profile during this time, and there is even more than one person who is eyeing him.

However, he didn't regret it, he wanted to raise the Supreme Dao rules as soon as possible, so that the real body could copy the body to impact the First Supreme Dao Realm!

"Father, let's do it, just go to the Dao realm, you can kill it with a wave of your hand. True Yang urged.

Rumble!!!!!

They moved instantly.

The two double Dao realms are indeed not something that Ye Tian can compete with.

Even if his copy body is strong in the Supreme Dao rules and can still use the Supreme Dao Divine Power, it can only be compared to the not weak Double Dao Realm, and there is no way to defeat the True Yang and the True River Valley Lord.

However, his replica body cannot fall, because it really contains many treasures on its body, and it cannot be lost.

He had to hold on until a replica of his real body arrived.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with Zhenhe and Zhenyang, and fell into disadvantage in an instant, but relying on the supreme Dao Extreme spear technique to resist the opponent's attack, it was still not easy to be killed in a short time.

And Zhenhe and Zhenyang were shocked when they saw that Ye Tian was using a supreme dao supernatural power, and the supreme dao rule realm was far beyond them.
